arts.ttl: Thursday's Eredivisie predictions including FC Twente vs. PSV Eindhoven
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Eredivisie fixtures, including FC Twente vs. PSV Eindhoven.

arts.ttl: Match preview Twente vs PSV: Pressure at the top, tension below
arts.sum: Twente have only beaten PSV once in their last 21 Eredivisie meetings, but their home record tells a different story. They’ve lost just one of their last five home games against PSV.
